name: Avenira Limited
description: Avenira Limited is an Australian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on creating value through the development of its premium-grade phosphate and gold projects. The company's flagship asset is the Wonarah Phosphate Project in the Northern Territory, which is one of the largest high-grade phosphate deposits in Australia. Avenira is actively working to develop Wonarah to supply the agricultural and Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP) battery markets, while also exploring its Jervois Gold Project.
